tiktok.caption: That '$3/day' price tag is hiding $51,000 from your future self. Here's the math 🧵

youtube_short.title: The '$3/Day' Trick That Costs You $51,000
title_alternatives: Why '$3 a Day' Is the Most Expensive Thing You Own
youtube_short.description: Every subscription, gym membership, and app pitches itself as 'just a few dollars a day' — and that framing is a psychological weapon designed to hide the real price tag. Stack just six of these tiny daily costs together and you're looking at $14 a day, $5,110 a year, and $51,000 in lost wealth over a decade. The scary part? 68% of people can't estimate their annual subscription costs within $500. The daily price trick is working exactly as designed. Pull up your bank statement and do the math. #personalfinance #subscriptions #moneytips #savemoney #financialfreedom
